synopsis:
Fifth issue from Marvel Comics Doctor Aphra (2025) Series
WHO SLICED THE SLICER?
To avoid prison, DOCTOR APHRA became an agent of the NEW REPUBLIC! But to keep her in line during her parole, they had her electro-tattoos locked. But who could do that to the galaxy's greatest slicer? The answer WILL SHOCK YOU!
title: Doctor Aphra (2025): Chaos Agent #05
